title: Runner crash mid-execution (partial stream)
description: The runner process crashes or is killed while bridging events. All events stored before the crash must remain intact, and the execution must be marked as 'failed' by the sweeper.
production_scenario: OOM kill, Docker restart, or segfault terminates the runner mid-execution. No data must be lost, and the execution must eventually reach a terminal state (not hang as 'running' forever).
